title: Reading and Use of English - Part 4
description: For questions 25 – 30, complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given. You must use between two and five words, including the word given. Here is an example (0).

example.firstSentence: It's not compulsory to wear a uniform here.

questions.firstSentence: People speak French in this part of Belgium.
questions.secondSentence: French (1) _________ in this part of Belgium.

questions.firstSentence: The coffee was so strong that I couldn't sleep.
questions.secondSentence: It was (1) _________ that I couldn't sleep.

questions.firstSentence: They haven't decorated the bedroom yet.
My father was in the habit of telling me stories.
